creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was told by the kernel today to add to this PR ;)

This is on my TUXEDO InfinityBook Pro Gen7 (MK1) running main-n274670. The card did not associate immediately at boot but did after two invocations of `ifconfig destroy wlan0 ; /etc/netstart` (this is some stubborn issue here anyway, wireless network is just this laptop and a phone but living in an apartment building).

Output of dmesg, pciconf -lv, dmidecode, and packages with 'drm' in their name is at https://people.freebsd.org/~rene/stuff/tuxedo-n274670.txt
